# DevOps CI/CD Pipeline Demo

This project demonstrates a simple CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions.

## Features
- Python application
- Unit testing with pytest
- Docker containerization
- CI pipeline:
  - Install dependencies
  - Run tests
  - Build Docker image
  - Run container

## Tech Stack
- Python
- Docker
- GitHub Actions

## How it works
Every push triggers the pipeline:
1. Code is tested
2. Docker image is built
3. Container is executed
